_comment: Curated register of Bulgarian individuals under US (OFAC Global Magnitsky) / EU sanctions. These are OFFICIAL government designations (public record), matched to the resolved person layer. To avoid implicating the WRONG same-named person, an entry attaches ONLY when it carries a stable disambiguator (`mpId`); name-ambiguous designees stay `resolved:false` (documented, not published) until a person is confirmed. Verify any designation at the official OFAC SDN search: https://sanctionssearch.ofac.treas.gov/

designees.name: Васил Крумов Божков
designees.note: Омоними в регистъра — изисква ръчно уточняване на конкретното лице

designees.name: Илко Димитров Желязков
designees.note: Не е публична изборна личност — изисква ръчно уточняване
